intentSynonyms: search for monitored entities (applications, hosts, dashboards, synthetic monitors, etc in newrelic
description: Search for monitored entities (applications, hosts, dashboards, synthetic monitors, etc.) by query. Use domain filters like "domain IN ('APM', 'INFRA', 'BROWSER')" or type filters like "type = 'APPLICATION'". Combine with name search: "name LIKE 'my-app'".

query.description: Entity search query using NRQL-like syntax (e.g., "name LIKE 'my-app' AND domain = 'APM'")

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
